generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUst10LxLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor for 360-degree scanning"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointClouds
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel RealSense D435i depth camera for RGB-D imaging"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageData
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor measuring wheel rotation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor measuring wheel orientation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

instance VedderESC : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor control"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for vehicle direction control"
]

instance LiDARPointClouds : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUst10LxLiDAR
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUst10LxLiDAR, IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance LiDARPointCloudsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "LiDAR point cloud data for clustering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointClouds
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38
]

instance DepthImageDataData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth image data for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed data for state monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SteeringAngleDataData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data for state monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance ObjectTracksDataData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object track data from Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Combined vehicle state data stored in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DBSCANPointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for clustering LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38
]

instance KalmanFilterObjectTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for tracking objects using LiDAR and depth data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38
]

instance ISO15622ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant Adaptive Cruise Control model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 software stack for AI and edge computing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ACCComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, VehicleEnvironment3DVisualizationService
]

instance ROS2 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 for inter-process communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ACCComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, VehicleEnvironment3DVisualizationService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for point cloud processing and object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ACCComputationOffloadingService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance computing tasks"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ACCComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for ACC model development"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of vehicle data with visualization, saving, and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualization, DataSaving, ReportGeneration
]

instance ACCComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC computations to remote systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCComputationOffloading
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote control of ACC features including enable/disable, speed setting, and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableDisableACC, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBraking
]

instance VehicleEnvironment3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of the vehicle's environment for situational awareness"
    DTDFVocab:provides 3DVisualization
]

instance RealTimeVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of sensor data and object tracks"
]

instance DataSaving : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Saving vehicle state and object track data to SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ReportGeneration : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generating human-readable reports on vehicle status and detected objects"
]

instance ACCComputationOffloading : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC calculations to external systems for efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableDisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enabling or disabling the Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Setting the desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBraking : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Activating emergency braking when obstacles are detected"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance 3DVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D rendering of the vehicle's surroundings for operator visualization"
]

instance AutonomousVehicle : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle based on Traxxas Slash 4x4"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment AutonomousVehicleEnvironment
]

instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoUst10LxLiDAR, IntelD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, VedderESC, SteeringServo, NVIDIAJetpack50, ROS2, Python38, CPlusPlus, MATLABSimulink, DataMonitoringService, ACCComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, VehicleEnvironment3DVisualizationService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands (desired speed, emergency braking) and steering commands to the vehicle's motor and steering servo."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency of at most 100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based structure with Physical Twin Entity (sensors, actuators), Digital Twin Entity (data processing, ACC), User Entity (visualization, control), and Cross-System Data Translation FE; communication via ROS2 and Wi-Fi."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design phase (cyber-physical experimentation), validation of requirements, and operational phase for monitoring and optimization."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-entity communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication with ≤100 ms latency."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin components on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano (vehicle), Digital Twin Entity and User Entity deployed on external hardware (cloud or separate system), Data Storage external to vehicle."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for digital twin framework and ISO 15622 for ACC control strategy."
]
